summary: Made two surgical polish edits: replaced a calibration-only Agnes line and shifted the ending from repeated explanatory doubt to Carmen's decision to wait for proof, preserving continuity without duplicating chapter 1's closing cadence.
edits: Replaced Agnes's repeated "No." with "Not now." to avoid calibration-only style-bible language while keeping her near-silent refusal intact.
Kept the opening unchanged because its entry structure already differs from the visible adjacent opening in the boundary context.
Revised the last beat so Carmen closes the chapter in a procedural, watchful posture instead of ending on another near-identical failed rationalization.
